---
title: "Contact"
description: "Get in touch with StudyStats. Book a free 20-minute discovery call or send a project enquiry — replies within one working day."
pagetitle: "Contact StudyStats — Biostatistics Consulting"
format: html
---

## Get in touch

Tell us about your project and we'll reply within one working day. Prefer to talk? Book a free 20-minute discovery call.

::: {.contact-info style="font-size:1.15em; margin:1em 0;"}
<p><strong>Email:</strong> <a href="mailto:studystatsbb@gmail.com" id="email">studystatsbb@gmail.com</a> <button class="btn btn-secondary btn-sm" onclick="copyText('email')" style="margin-left:0.5em;">Copy</button></p>

<p><strong>Cell / WhatsApp:</strong> <a href="https://wa.me/27718904528" id="cell">+27 71 890 4528</a> <button class="btn btn-secondary btn-sm" onclick="copyText('cell')" style="margin-left:0.5em;">Copy</button></p>
:::

### Send a project enquiry

<!--
  TODO: replace YOUR_FORM_ID with your real Formspree (or Tally / Netlify) endpoint.
  Sign up free at https://formspree.io and paste the endpoint below.
-->

<form action="https://formspree.io/f/YOUR_FORM_ID" method="POST" class="enquiry-form" style="display:grid; gap:0.75rem; max-width:640px; margin-top:1rem;">
  <label>Your name
    <input type="text" name="name" required class="form-control" />
  </label>
  <label>Email
    <input type="email" name="email" required class="form-control" />
  </label>
  <label>Project type
    <select name="project_type" class="form-control">
      <option>MMed / MSc research report</option>
      <option>PhD thesis</option>
      <option>Journal manuscript</option>
      <option>Sample size only</option>
      <option>Other</option>
    </select>
  </label>
  <label>Deadline (approx.)
    <input type="text" name="deadline" placeholder="e.g. end of August" class="form-control" />
  </label>
  <label>Tell us about your project
    <textarea name="message" rows="5" required class="form-control"></textarea>
  </label>
  <button type="submit" class="btn btn-light btn-lg" style="font-weight:600; justify-self:start;">Send enquiry</button>
</form>

```{=html}
<script>
function copyText(elementId) {
  var text = document.getElementById(elementId).innerText;
  navigator.clipboard.writeText(text).then(function() {
      alert("Copied: " + text);
  }, function(err) {
      console.error("Error copying text: ", err);
  });
}
</script>
```
